info.title: PBShop JavaScript Express Prisma API
info.description: Shared-document-based JavaScript Express Prisma backend for PBShop. Recent parity work includes Error Code Catalog, Query API, Chat REST extensions, and Socket.IO chat events.

message.example: The requested resource could not be found.

x-socket-events.name: joinRoom
x-socket-events.description: Join an existing chat room after JWT-authenticated socket connection.

x-socket-events.name: leaveRoom
x-socket-events.description: Leave a previously joined chat room.

x-socket-events.name: sendMessage
x-socket-events.description: Persist a chat message and broadcast newMessage to the room.

x-socket-events.name: newMessage
x-socket-events.description: Broadcast when a room member sends a new message.

x-socket-events.name: messageRead
x-socket-events.description: Emit that a specific chat message was read.

x-socket-events.name: readReceipt
x-socket-events.description: Broadcast read receipt to other room members.

x-socket-events.name: typing
x-socket-events.description: Emit typing status for a room.

x-socket-events.name: userTyping
x-socket-events.description: Broadcast typing state to other room members.

200.description: Sync a single query product view
